description: Nut allergy → blacklist all nut-containing foods
Lactose allergy → blacklist dairy foods
Gluten allergy → blacklist gluten-containing foods
Seafood allergy → blacklist all seafood
Egg allergy → blacklist egg-based foods

action: ({ blacklisted_foods: ['Red meat (beef, pork, lamb, venison)', 'Poultry (chicken, turkey, duck)', 'Fish & seafood', 'Meat-based broths and gravies', 'Gelatin-containing foods'] })

description: Pescatarian diet style — exclude red meat and poultry
action: ({ blacklisted_foods: ['Red meat (beef, pork, lamb)', 'Poultry (chicken, turkey, duck)', 'Processed deli meats (sausage, salami, hot dogs)'] })

description: Both hypertension & diabetes → DASH diet with reduced carbs
Hypertension → assign DASH diet
DASH diet → limit sodium to 1500 mg/day
Diabetes → assign Low-GI diet
Low-GI diet → carbs 40%, protein 30%, fat 30%
Compute BMI from weight and height
condition: FACTS.weight_kg !== undefined && FACTS.height_cm !== undefined && FACTS.bmi === undefined
action: const h = FACTS.height_cm / 100; return { bmi: parseFloat((FACTS.weight_kg / (h * h)).toFixed(1)) };

description: Classify BMI into Underweight / Normal / Overweight / Obese
action: const bmi = FACTS.bmi; if (bmi < 18.5) return { bmi_category: 'Underweight' }; if (bmi < 25) return { bmi_category: 'Normal' }; if (bmi < 30) return { bmi_category: 'Overweight' }; return { bmi_category: 'Obese' };

description: Compute BMR using Mifflin-St Jeor formula
condition: FACTS.age !== undefined && FACTS.gender !== undefined && FACTS.weight_kg !== undefined && FACTS.height_cm !== undefined && FACTS.bmr === undefined
action: const base = 10 * FACTS.weight_kg + 6.25 * FACTS.height_cm - 5 * FACTS.age; const bmr = FACTS.gender === 'male' ? base + 5 : base - 161; return { bmr: Math.round(bmr) };

description: Compute TDEE from BMR × activity multiplier
condition: FACTS.bmr !== undefined && FACTS.activity_level !== undefined && FACTS.tdee === undefined

description: Lose weight + Overweight/Obese → TDEE − 500 kcal
condition: FACTS.goal === 'lose_weight' && FACTS.tdee !== undefined && (FACTS.bmi_category === 'Overweight' || FACTS.bmi_category === 'Obese') && FACTS.target_calories === undefined

description: Lose weight + Normal BMI → TDEE − 250 kcal
condition: FACTS.goal === 'lose_weight' && FACTS.tdee !== undefined && FACTS.bmi_category === 'Normal' && FACTS.target_calories === undefined

description: Lose weight + Underweight → do not cut, use TDEE
condition: FACTS.goal === 'lose_weight' && FACTS.tdee !== undefined && FACTS.bmi_category === 'Underweight' && FACTS.target_calories === undefined

description: Maintain weight → target = TDEE
Gain weight + Underweight → TDEE + 300 kcal
condition: FACTS.goal === 'gain_weight' && FACTS.tdee !== undefined && FACTS.bmi_category === 'Underweight' && FACTS.target_calories === undefined

description: Gain weight + Normal/Overweight → TDEE + 200 kcal
condition: FACTS.goal === 'gain_weight' && FACTS.tdee !== undefined && FACTS.bmi_category !== 'Underweight' && FACTS.target_calories === undefined

description: Sleep < 6 h/night — reduce target calories by 5% for metabolic adaptation
condition: FACTS.sleep_hours !== undefined && FACTS.sleep_hours < 6 && FACTS.target_calories !== undefined && FACTS.carb_g === undefined

description: High stress level — increase target calories by 5% for cortisol-driven metabolic demand
DASH diet → macros: 55% carb / 27% fat / 18% protein
action: const cal = FACTS.target_calories; return { carb_g: Math.round((cal * 0.55) / 4), fat_g: Math.round((cal * 0.27) / 9), protein_g: Math.round((cal * 0.18) / 4) };

description: Low-GI diet → macros: 40% carb / 30% fat / 30% protein
action: const cal = FACTS.target_calories; return { carb_g: Math.round((cal * 0.40) / 4), fat_g: Math.round((cal * 0.30) / 9), protein_g: Math.round((cal * 0.30) / 4) };

description: Balanced diet → macros: 50% carb / 30% fat / 20% protein
action: const cal = FACTS.target_calories; return { carb_g: Math.round((cal * 0.50) / 4), fat_g: Math.round((cal * 0.30) / 9), protein_g: Math.round((cal * 0.20) / 4) };

description: No medical condition → assign Balanced diet
DASH diet → populate recommended food list
Low-GI diet → populate recommended food list
Balanced diet → populate recommended food list
Strength or mixed training — increase protein target by 20% for muscle repair and growth
